---
title: "\'Mothers in Council\'"
---

## \'Mothers in Council\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** <i>MP</i> (June 1886), 572-577.
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

### Notes

Written in collaboration with Christabel Coleridge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
